clinical_note.summary: 78F with AF, HTN, osteoarthritis and MCI (per context). Med rec with daughter. Identified furosemide added by previous GP (not on record) and intermittent OTC ibuprofen use. Reports a fall ~2 weeks ago with wobbliness.
clinical_note.assessment: Medication discrepancies; doctor concerned about the new diuretic plus the fall and about an ibuprofen interaction.
clinical_note.plan: Confirm furosemide and reconcile the list; flagged ibuprofen interaction; check standing BP and kidney bloods today.
